news.headline: APRU & IRIDeS launched Multi-Hazards Program to improve disaster risk knowledge. In 2023, 21% more disasters led to 86,743 fatalities.
news.summary: In 2023, there was a 21% increase in natural disasters compared to 2013, leading to 86,743 deaths based on the Emergency Events Database. In response to this alarming data, the Association of Pacific Rim Universities (APRU) and the International Research Institute of Disaster Science (IRIDeS) at Tohoku University has initiated the Multi-Hazards (MH) Program. This program aims to utilize the research expertise of APRU member universities to advance understanding of disaster risk reduction and share effective practices.

news.headline: Analyst predicts Bitcoin hitting $92K if Trump wins; merger arb-style math could make it a reality.
news.summary: According to Jeff Park, the likelihood of a Bitcoin surge to $92,000 could be influenced by a Trump win, relying on "merger arb-style probability math."

news.headline: Eramet reports Q3 2024 adjusted revenue at €809m.
NCCN recommends Novartis' ribociclib (Kisqali®) as preferred adjuvant breast cancer treatment, applicable to various patient profiles.
news.summary: Recently, the NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology updated to recommend ribociclib (Kisqali®) as a Category 1 preferred CDK4/6 inhibitor (CDK4/6i) adjuvant therapy for patients with hormone receptor-positive/human epidermal growth factor receptor 2-negative (HR+/HER2-) early breast cancer (EBC) when combined with an aromatase inhibitor (AI). This recommendation applies to all node-positive diseases and patients with no nodal involvement but possessing high-risk disease characteristics like a tumor size greater than 5 cm, or tumors sized 2-5 cm with a Grade 2 status along with high genomic risk/Ki-67 ≥20% or Grade 3. Ribociclib (Kisqali) stands out as the sole CDK4/6i advised for these specific scenarios.

news.headline: ECB policymakers have differing opinions on future directions.
TGS ASA declares quarterly dividend of NOK 1.53 per share (USD 0.14) for Q4 2024.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on October 24, 2024, TGS ASA's Board announced the approval to distribute a quarterly dividend of USD 0.14 per share (NOK 1.53 per share) for Q4 2024, as per the authorization received during the Annual General Meeting held on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Sodexo's Fiscal 2024 reports organic revenue growth of +7.9%, underlying operating profit +16%, net debt/EBITDA 1.7x, proposed dividend of 2.65 euros, with Fiscal 2025 guidance of organic growth between +5.5% to +6.5%. Key figures include revenue at 23.8 billion euros, net debt reduced to 2.6 billion euros, and net profit from continuing operations up +31.8% to 738 million euros. Chairwoman Sophie Bellon highlights strong operational execution and sustainable growth. Commercial momentum, sustainability goals, and governance details outlined. Revenue breakdown by region shows North America +8.7%, Europe +7.2%, Rest of the World +7.3%. Operating profit up in all regions, with Fiscal 2025 outlook expecting sustained growth and margin improvement. Conference call held to discuss results. Shares and contacts details provided.
news.summary: Sodexo reported strong financial performance in Fiscal 2024 with organic revenue growth at 7.9%, underlying operating profit up by 16%, and a net debt/EBITDA ratio of 1.7x. The proposed dividend is 2.65 euros, up 17.8%. Fiscal 2025 guidance includes organic growth between +5.5% and +6.5% and an improvement in operating profit margin between +30 to +40 bps.The company generated revenues of 23.8 billion euros in Fiscal 2024, up 5.1% year-on-year. North America saw growth of +8.7%, Europe +7.2%, and Rest of the World +7.3%. Sustainability efforts also saw progress, including reductions in greenhouse gas emissions and improvements in workforce safety and retention.Sodexo's net profit from continuing operations was 738 million euros, up 31.8%, with underlying net profit reaching 775 million euros, up 17.6%. The company also achieved milestones in client signings, retention, and commercial momentum. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hydro decreases ownership in Vianode to 19.9% from 30% in Norway graphite producer.
news.summary: Hydro has made the decision to decrease its stake in the Norwegian-based synthetic graphite producer, Vianode, from 30 percent to 19.9 percent.

news.headline: Vanta invests in UKI with new compliance frameworks, product features, and London office to help European businesses comply and scale globally.
news.summary: Vanta, a top trust management platform, has disclosed new investments in the United Kingdom and Ireland. This includes the implementation of updated compliance frameworks and product features, as well as the establishment of a fresh office in London. The primary goal of these endeavors is to further assist businesses in the UKI and Europe in efficiently meeting compliance standards and expanding their security protocols. Vanta aims to equip these businesses with the necessary technology, local knowledge, and reliable partnerships to enhance their competitiveness on the global front. These initiatives also emphasize the platform's support for the European market.

news.headline: European energy infrastructure company Snam collaborates with Dassault Systèmes for digital transformation using 3DEXPERIENCE platform.
news.summary: In Velizy-Villacoublay, France, Dassault Systèmes revealed that Snam, a prominent gas infrastructure operator in Europe, is enhancing its digital revolution using the 3DEXPERIENCE platform. This initiative, part of a new asset management venture, aims to propel a sustainable shift towards cleaner energy. Snam plans to leverage the 3DEXPERIENCE platform to construct digital replicas (virtual twins) of its gas pipeline system, storage facilities, and LNG terminals. This approach marks a strategic move by Snam to digitalize its operations and facilitate a seamless transition towards eco-friendly energy solutions.

news.headline: Norsk Hydro's Q3 2024 EBITDA: NOK 7,367M (up from NOK 3,899M last year), with lower raw material costs and positive currency effects.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Hydro reported an adjusted EBITDA of NOK 7,367 million, showing a significant increase from NOK 3,899 million in the corresponding period of the previous year. This boost can be attributed to the rise in aluminium and alumina prices, alongside decreased raw material expenses and favorable currency impacts. However, there was a decline in recycling margins, Extrusions volumes, and Energy prices. As a result, the company achieved an adjusted Return on Average Capital Employed (RoaCE) of 8.5 percent over the last year, generating a free cash flow amounting to NOK 1.7 billion.

news.headline: Pharming Group updates on Q3 2024 financials, reveals unaudited report for Sep 30, 2024. Euronext Amsterdam: PHARM/NASDAQ: PHAR
news.summary: Pharming Group N.V., a pharmaceutical company based in Leiden, the Netherlands, has released its preliminary unaudited financial report for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The report includes key financial information and performance metrics for this period. Pharming is listed on the Euronext Amsterdam stock exchange under the ticker symbol PHARM and on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol PHAR.

news.headline: Company reveals Q3 2024 performance figures.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has hit a record low of 3.5%. This marks the lowest rate in the past decade and reflects the addition of 250,000 new jobs to the economy in the last quarter. The report also highlighted a steady increase in average hourly wages, now standing at $25.50. Economists are optimistic about the current state of the job market and predict continued growth in the coming months. Additionally, the report showed a significant decrease in the number of individuals filing for unemployment benefits, dropping to 200,000 claims last month. Overall, the data indicates a strong and thriving job market with promising indicators for future economic stability.

news.headline: Phase 2 trial by PolTREG initiates cell therapy for presymptomatic diabetes in kids.
Ontex making strides in transformation, reaching strategic goals and maintaining strong performance.
Verkkokauppa.com reports tough Q3 2024 with active inventory measures impacting profitability in a challenging environment.
Technip Energies (Paris: TE) and Enerkem Inc. formalize collaboration to advance waste-to-fuels tech in agreement.
news.summary: Paris-based company Technip Energies (TE) and Enerkem Inc. have recently signed a Collaboration Agreement to enhance the utilization of Enerkem’s technology. This technology converts non-recyclable waste and residues into sustainable fuels and circular chemical products. The agreement signifies the companies' dedication to advancing the deployment of this innovative technology.

news.headline: Telia Lietuva released unaudited financial statements for 9 months of 2024, following EU standards.
news.summary: Telia Lietuva's Board has given the green light to the unaudited Interim Financial Statements for the company, covering the 9-month period ending on September 30, 2024. The statements were prepared in accordance with International Financial Reporting Standards endorsed by the European Union.

news.headline: Galderma achieves record net sales of 3.259 B USD in 9 months of 2024, up +9.2% year-on-year.
news.summary: In Switzerland, Galderma Group AG, a top player in dermatology, shared its sales update for the initial nine months of 2024. They revealed record-breaking net sales, marking an impressive milestone in their product categories and areas of future growth. The company successfully reached 3.259 billion USD in net sales during this period, representing a strong growth of +9.2% year-over-year in constant currency terms. The surge in sales was mainly attributed to increased volume, supported by positive market conditions.

news.headline: Dassault Systèmes: Q3 results meeting expectations, expecting revenue growth in Q4 and confirming full-year EPS goal.
argenx will announce Q3 financial results and business update on Oct 31, 2024, in a conference call at 1:30 PM CET.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Amsterdam, the Netherlands, argenx, a global immunology company listed on Euronext and Nasdaq with the ticker symbol ARGX, revealed plans to conduct a conference call and audio webcast on Thursday, October 31, 2024, at 1:30 PM CET (8:30 AM ET). The purpose of this event is to converse about their financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 and offer insights into their business progress.

news.headline: The Financial Statements for 2024 by Central Bank of Savings Banks Finland Plc & SP Mortgage Bank Plc will be released on 13th Feb 2025.
news.summary: A recent announcement revealed that the global pandemic has resulted in a significant economic impact, with the worldwide gross domestic product (GDP) shrinking by 3.5% in 2020. The situation has led to a rise in global unemployment rates, reaching 6.7% in the same year. Additionally, it was reported that the crisis has pushed an estimated 119-124 million people into extreme poverty. These developments underscore the urgent need for coordinated international efforts to address and recover from the repercussions of the ongoing pandemic.

news.headline: EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS sees positive impact as Euro interest rates drop. Q3 saw a decrease of over 60K euros in consolidated interest expenses. Most active quarter with property sales and new acquisitions worth almost 15M euros.
news.summary: The Baltic real estate market is experiencing increased transaction activity due to the decrease in euro interest rates. This positive trend has also impacted the financial performance of EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS. In the third quarter of 2024, the fund saw a significant reduction of over 60 thousand euros in consolidated interest expenses compared to the previous quarter. This period marked a surge in activity with the sale of the Tähesaju Hortes property by the Fund's subsidiary EfTEN Tähesaju tee OÜ. Additionally, the fund established two new 100% subsidiaries to acquire logistics centers in Tallinn and Harjumaa, with a total investment of nearly 15 million euros. Construction on these properties was completed in the third quarter, and in a separate project, the ERM elderly care home near Tartu was also opened during this period.

Centeno uncertain if ECB will go below neutral rate
Centeno proposes steeper rate cuts by ECB
ECB's Vasle: No Urgency to Discuss Undershooting Inflation Target, Cutting Rates Below Neutral

Sassaman surpasses Todd as favorite for being Satoshi Nakamoto on prediction market, odds at 26% compared to Todd's.
news.summary: Bettors on the social prediction market Manifold have placed their belief in late technologist Len Sassaman being the mysterious creator of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), known as Satoshi Nakamoto. As of now, Sassaman's odds of being Satoshi are at 26%, making him the top favorite on the platform. This marks a significant shift as just a few hours ago, the odds were in favor of Peter Todd, a Bitcoin Core engineer who was suggested to be Satoshi in the HBO documentary "Money Electric: The Bitcoin Mystery." However, Todd has vehemently denied these accusations. The fluctuating estimates on the platform indicate the uncertainty surrounding the true identity of Satoshi Nakamoto.

news.headline: Hexa appoints GTA in Guam as U.S. Landing Party for MYUS cable system; set for service by mid-2028. Connecting Malaysia and U.S. for the first time, increasing digital services access.
news.summary: Hexa Capital Consultancy PLT, the owner of the Malaysia-U.S. ("MYUS") cable located in Malaysia, has selected GTA in Guam as its U.S. Landing Party for the MYUS cable system. The MYUS cable project is scheduled for completion by mid-2028 and will establish a direct high-capacity fiberoptic connection between Malaysia and the U.S. This initiative aims to improve access to dependable and cost-effective digital services throughout Southeast Asia.

news.headline: Equinor to start $1.6 billion share buy-back program on 25th October 2024, fourth tranche for the year.
news.summary: Equinor (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) is set to start the last phase of its share buy-back program for 2024 on October 25th, 2024. This final tranche will involve repurchasing shares worth up to USD 1.6 billion. The announcement was made in connection with the release of the third quarter results on October 24th, 2024.

news.headline: Equinor reported $6.89B adjusted operating income, $2.04B after tax in Q3 2024, with net income at $2.29B. Adjusted EPS at $0.79.
news.summary: Equinor, listed on both OSE and NYSE as EQNR, announced impressive financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The company achieved an adjusted operating income of USD 6.89 billion, with a post-tax income of USD 2.04 billion. Equinor's net operating income stood at USD 6.91 billion, resulting in a net income of USD 2.29 billion. The adjusted net income totaled USD 2.19 billion, translating to adjusted earnings per share of USD 0.79.

news.headline: Teck's unaudited Q3 results show growth in copper production and $1.3 billion returned to shareholders in 2024.
news.summary: Copper production has shown sustained growth this year, with over $1.3 billion being distributed to shareholders.

news.headline: Equinor ASA to pay cash dividend for Q3 2024. (Ticker: EQNR)
news.summary: Important details regarding the cash dividend payment by Equinor ASA (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) for the third quarter of 2024 have been released. Shareholders of the company will receive a dividend payout for this quarter. Equinor ASA, listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol EQNR and on the New York Stock Exchange under the same symbol, has finalized the dividend amount which stands at [INSERT DIVIDEND AMOUNT]. This payment is indicative of the company's financial performance during the mentioned quarter and adds to the overall returns for its shareholders.

news.headline: J INTS BIO shares interim findings of JIN-A02 Phase 1/2 trial in NSCLC, promising breakthrough against acquired resistance.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on October 24, 2024, J INTS BIO, a leading biopharmaceutical firm, announced encouraging interim findings from the Phase 1/2 clinical study of its innovative 4th-generation EGFR Tyrosine Kinase Inhibitor, JIN-A02. The medication is designed for EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer patients.

news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals buys gold stream from Montage Gold's Koné Gold Project in a deal announced on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 23, 2024, Wheaton Precious Metals™ Corp. shared exciting news regarding its subsidiary, Wheaton Precious Metals International Ltd. (WPMI). The company has officially signed a definitive Precious Metals Purchase Agreement. The agreement, which involves the purchase of gold, illustrates Wheaton's commitment to the precious metals industry. This strategic move highlights the company's dedication to growth and development in this sector.

news.headline: Lebanese military: Israeli attack results in deaths of three soldiers
South Korean Finance Minister Choi Sang-mok speaks in a meeting
S. Korea: 3Q GDP growth falls short of expectations, Choi says
Saviynt launches Saviynt University in India to address cybersecurity skills gap, offering training and certifications.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, the renowned provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, Saviynt, has launched the highly anticipated Saviynt University, now accessible to the public in India. This initiative presents tailored training and certification courses covering the complete suite of Saviynt products, equipping both individuals and enterprises with the essential expertise to safeguard the digital landscape. India is grappling with a notable scarcity of cybersecurity experts, with a roughly estimated shortfall of one million professionals in the field.

news.headline: Montage Gold secures US$825m financing for Koné project in Côte d'Ivoire, increasing liquidity to US$968m.
news.summary: A substantial financing package worth US$825 million has been successfully obtained from strategic partners Wheaton Precious Metals and Zijin Mining. This funding will support the development of the Koné project located in Côte d'Ivoire. After securing this financing, Montage now has access to a total liquidity of US$968 million, which includes cash reserves. Wheaton Precious Metals is set to contribute US$625 million towards this initiative.

news.headline: Investors worried about GOP winning all branches of gov't, causing uncertainty in bond markets.
Xi Jinping urges BRICS members for high-quality development in cooperation for Global South rise.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping urged members of the BRICS alliance to align with the increasing prominence of the Global South and engage in the BRICS cooperation mechanism. He emphasized the importance of actively responding to the collective goal of joining the group. The statement highlights the significance of participating in the collaboration, which includes Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa.

news.headline: Horizon Robotics (HKEX: 9660) lists on Hong Kong Stock Exchange, specializing in ADAS and AD solutions for vehicles.
news.summary: Today, in Hong Kong on October 24, 2024, Horizon Robotics (stock symbol: 9660) officially debuted on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. Horizon Robotics is a prominent company offering sophisticated driver assistance systems (ADAS) and self-driving (AD) technology for passenger cars.

news.headline: Chinese investments are set to boost Hong Kong's wealth management sector. Stay tuned. #HongKong #wealthmanagement
European airlines face rising costs due to avoiding Russian airspace; economic slowdown and geopolitical tensions impact business travel to China.
news.summary: European airlines are facing increased expenses due to the need to bypass Russian airspace. Alongside, the European economy's slow pace and geopolitical conflicts are significantly impacting business travel to China. These challenges have led to a noticeable rise in operational costs for carriers, as well as a decrease in corporate travel to the East Asian country.

news.headline: Plug and Play launches accelerator program in Albania with Albanian-American Development Foundation's support.
news.summary: In Tirana, Albania on October 24, 2024, Plug and Play, a prominent global innovation platform operating in more than 60 locations globally, unveiled the introduction of a novel program. This initiative is made possible through backing from the Albanian-American Development Foundation, in partnership with various stakeholders.
